subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-09-17
subcodes.first_line: I ask the Blessed Beauty to assist you and confirm you. Wherever I go, you will be in my thoughts.
subcodes.first_line_orig: از عنایت جمال مبارک شما را تائید و توفیق میطلبم در هر جا و محل باشم
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual transformation, @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge
